name: RailType
summary: Rail types used for creating filleted Brep edges

enum_values.name: DistanceFromEdge
enum_values.summary: The distance from the edge curves determines the intersection.

enum_values.name: RollingBall
enum_values.summary: The radius of a rolling ball determines the intersection.

enum_values.name: DistanceBetweenRails
enum_values.summary: The distance between the edge rails determines the intersection.
